exercises.title: Watch Pod Events
exercises.description: Follow events while a pod schedules, starts, and becomes ready.
exercises.expected_outcome: You can trace the pod lifecycle in order.

exercises.title: Inspect a Pod Shell
exercises.description: Exec into a pod and inspect processes, cgroups, and network state.
exercises.expected_outcome: You can see the in-pod view of the process namespace.

exercises.title: Deploy PostgreSQL with PVC
exercises.description: Run a stateful workload, delete the pod, and verify the data survives.

exercises.title: Write a NetworkPolicy
exercises.description: Allow traffic only between selected pods and verify other traffic is blocked.

exercises.title: Build a Custom Controller
exercises.description: Watch a CRD and create or update a ConfigMap when the resource changes.
exercises.expected_outcome: The controller continuously reconciles desired state.

exercises.title: Create a Canary Rollout
exercises.description: Split traffic between stable and canary versions and add a rollback path.
exercises.expected_outcome: You can shift traffic gradually and stop the rollout if metrics regress.
